channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: Maurer Long alley from Kunkegasse to Maurer Long alley 64
item.description: In the plateau area Geßlgasse, however, the work takes place at night during the idle time of the affected public transport. [12.04.2026 – 29.05.2026]
item.content:encoded:
In the plateau area Geßlgasse, however, the work takes place at night during the idle time of the affected public transport.
[12.04.2026 – 29.05.2026]

item.title: Frauenstiftgasse crossing Baumergasse to Haspingerplatz
item.description: The stop Haspingerplatz of the affected public transport will be merged with Discontinued and the station Baumergasse. [Since 22.03.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The stop Haspingerplatz of the affected public transport will be merged with Discontinued and the station Baumergasse.
[Since 22.03.2026]

item.title: U2/U5: Kirchengasse 1 to 30
item.description: In the Lindengasse / Kirchengasse crossing area and in the Kirchengasse at the height of ON 1 and ON 20-22, the underground station digs into the shafts. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
In the Lindengasse / Kirchengasse crossing area and in the Kirchengasse at the height of ON 1 and ON 20-22, the underground station digs into the shafts.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: U6: Underpass Pulverturmgasse between the inner and outer Währinger belt
item.description: The general renovation of the U6 route is carried out in the actual area when the passage is blocked (at the level of 9, Pulverturmgasse or 18, Sternwartestraße) between the inner and … [28.03.2026 – 31.08.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The general renovation of the U6 route is carried out in the actual area when the passage is blocked (at the level of 9, Pulverturmgasse or 18, Sternwartestraße) between the inner and …
[28.03.2026 – 31.08.2026]

item.title: U2/U5: Volksgartenstraße 2
item.description: The Volksgartenstraße between the Hansenstraße and the Museumstraße will block a lane in order to handle the construction site traffic for the underground construction. [Since 28.02.2021]
item.content:encoded:
The Volksgartenstraße between the Hansenstraße and the Museumstraße will block a lane in order to handle the construction site traffic for the underground construction.
[Since 28.02.2021]

item.title: 56A/56B/58A/58B: construction works Maxingstraße from 07 April 2026
item.description: Due to construction works in the Maxingstraße through the Vienna networks, the lines 56A, 56B, 58A and 58B must be redirected. [Since 23.02.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to construction works in the Maxingstraße through the Vienna networks, the lines 56A, 56B, 58A and 58B must be redirected.
[Since 23.02.2026]

item.title: 80A: diversion from 03 November 2025
item.description: Due to track construction works and the necessary preparations, the line 80A must be redirected. [Since 23.10.2025]
item.content:encoded:
Due to track construction works and the necessary preparations, the line 80A must be redirected.
[Since 23.10.2025]

item.title: Matzleinsdorfer Platz 3-4 to 5
item.description: In the course of the underground construction is since 28. March 2022, 09:00 o'clock the right turn lane towards 5. District on the departure ramp of the Margaret belt coming from Hauptbahnhof to … [Since 27.03.2022]
item.content:encoded:
In the course of the underground construction is since 28. March 2022, 09:00 o'clock the right turn lane towards 5. District on the departure ramp of the Margaret belt coming from Hauptbahnhof to …
[Since 27.03.2022]

item.title: N54: roadworks
item.description: in the Mariahilfer Straße area Period: From 10. September 2024, about 00:30 o'clock Measures: diversion towards Ober St. Veit U from Europaplatz / Mariahilfer Straße via … [Since 06.09.2024]
item.content:encoded:
in the Mariahilfer Straße area Period: From 10. September 2024, about 00:30 o'clock Measures: diversion towards Ober St. Veit U from Europaplatz / Mariahilfer Straße via …
[Since 06.09.2024]
